name: Alice
description: Alice is a medium cat that we found in the streets wandering around, hoping for a home that she could live in.
longdesc: Alice is a medium-sized cat that was found wandering the streets of Malabon, looking for a place to call home. She is an independent but affectionate cat who loves exploring her surroundings. Alice is gentle and calm, making her the perfect companion for someone looking for a loving, low-maintenance pet. Despite her past struggles, she has a strong will to survive and is ready to shower her new family with unconditional love. Her playful yet serene nature will bring joy to any home, and she will be a loyal friend to anyone who earns her trust.

name: Balmond
description: Balmond is a strong and confident cat, known for his loyalty and protective nature in his surroundings.
longdesc: Balmond is a strong and confident cat who has proven himself to be incredibly resilient. Born in the streets of Caloocan, he is known for his loyalty and protective nature. Despite his rough past, Balmond has a loving heart and enjoys the company of humans, as well as other animals. He is highly intelligent and will quickly adapt to any environment, bringing comfort and warmth wherever he goes. His calm demeanor and ability to sense emotions make him a perfect companion for families or individuals looking for a pet who can offer both affection and emotional support.

name: Miya
description: Miya is a curious and intelligent dog who loves to explore her surroundings. She's full of energy and love.
longdesc: Miya is a curious and intelligent dog who thrives on exploration. Born in the beautiful province of Cavite, she loves to learn and discover new places, making her an adventurous spirit. Miya has an energetic and playful nature, always ready for a game of fetch or a long walk in the park. Her loyalty is unmatched, and she quickly bonds with anyone she meets. Miya is also quite intuitive, understanding the moods of those around her and offering comfort when needed. Her enthusiasm for life is contagious, and she will brighten up any home with her love and playful antics.

name: Alucard
description: Alu is a gentle and calm dog with a loving personality. He enjoys relaxing around the house and is fun to play with.
longdesc: Alucard, also known as Alu, is a gentle and calm dog with a loving personality. Hailing from Munoz, Alu enjoys spending his days lounging around the house, but he is also playful when the time is right. He has a special fondness for his human companions and is always eager to offer affection, whether through cuddles or tail wags. Alu is incredibly patient and kind, making him an ideal pet for families with children or other pets. He may be small in size, but his heart is large, and he has a lot of love to give to anyone who welcomes him into their home.
